Package com.hp.workpath.api.authorization

Provides interfaces for retrieving Authorization

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractAuthorizationService
    AbstractAuthorizationService provides the base implementation for handling authorization features on the Workpath platform.
    AuthenticatedUserInfo
    AuthenticatedUserInfo class represents information about an authenticated user info.
    AuthorizationService
    The AuthorizationService class provides methods to interact with the SDK.
    ChangeNotificationEventData
    The ChangeNotificationEventData class provides information about change notification events.
    EmailAddressInfo
    Container for an email address and optional display name
    KeyValuePair
    Provides the key value pair
    LocalizedString
    Provides the localized string
    Permission
    The Permission class represents an object used to grant users permission
    PermissionToSignInMethod
    The PermissionToSignInMethod class represents the mapping between a permission and a sign-in method.
    ProxyConfiguration
    The ProxyConfiguration class manages the proxy settings for the Authorization service.
    ProxyConfiguration.Builder
    Builder class for ProxyConfiguration.
    SignInMethod
    The SignInMethod class represents a sign-in method used for authentication.
    Timestamp
    The Timestamp class represents a timestamp with a time value and an offset.
    UserAuthorizationData
    The UserAuthorizationData class represents the data required for user authorization.
    UserAuthorizationResult
    The UserAuthorizationResult class represents the result of the user authorization process.
    UserAuthorizationResult.Builder
    Builder class for UserAuthorizationResult.
    UserOverrides
    The UserOverrides class holds the user's override settings for various fields such as email addresses, subject, message, and fax details.
    UserOverrides.Builder
    Builder class for UserOverrides.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    AuthenticationType
    The AuthenticationType enum represents various types of authentication methods supported by the system.
    ChangeNotificationEventCode
    Provides the change notification event code.

Package com.hp.workpath.api.authorization Description

Provides interfaces for retrieving Authorization
